hero.name: Jean Bertin Kiomba
hero.description: Computer science student, web developer and digital solution creator. I transform ideas into modern, useful and accessible experiences.

about.label: Who am I?
about.title: About me
about.lead: I design digital projects that combine technology, creativity and entrepreneurship.
about.descriptionOne: I am a computer science student passionate about web development, artificial intelligence, e-commerce and the creation of digital solutions adapted to real needs.
about.descriptionTwo: My goal is to develop simple, modern and useful experiences while continuing to learn and explore new technologies.
about.cardOneText: Creation of modern and responsive interfaces adapted to different screen sizes.
about.cardTwoText: Development of digital ideas and projects with a market-oriented vision.
about.cardThreeText: Creation and management of digital commercial experiences focused on customers.
about.cardFourText: Exploration of new solutions using digital technology, automation and artificial intelligence.

projects.label: My universe
projects.title: Projects and activities
projects.description: A selection of digital projects and activities I am working on, presented without revealing their internal details.
projects.sellifyDescription: A digital solution designed to simplify and modernize business management.
projects.invityDescription: A digital project designed around connection, sharing and user experience.
projects.storesDescription: Discover a selection of stores and commercial activities available directly online.
projects.storeOneDescription: An online store offering a selection of products for the local market.
projects.storeTwoDescription: A modern e-commerce experience focused on simplicity and accessibility.
projects.storeThreeDescription: A digital commercial activity focused on customer needs.

skills.label: What I do
skills.title: Skills and expertise
skills.description: Skills I develop through my studies, personal projects and entrepreneurial activities.
skills.webDevelopmentText: Creation of modern, responsive and user-friendly websites and web applications.
skills.aiText: Exploration of artificial intelligence tools and their integration into digital projects.
skills.ecommerceText: Creation of online stores, product management and improvement of the customer experience.
skills.designText: Design of modern, consistent and user-friendly interfaces.
skills.projectManagementText: Organization, planning and monitoring of the different stages of a digital project.
skills.digitalBusinessText: Transformation of ideas into digital solutions capable of creating value.

vision.label: My vision
vision.quote: Creating simple digital solutions today to meet the needs of tomorrow.
vision.description: I believe technology should remain accessible, useful and human-centered. Every project is an opportunity to learn, innovate and build something that provides real value.

contact.label: Let's stay connected
contact.title: Do you have an idea or an opportunity?
contact.description: I am available to discuss projects, collaborations, entrepreneurship, web development or new opportunities.

footer.description: Web developer, computer science student and creator of digital solutions.
